channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AOC puts major tech company on notice amid looming price increases: 'Far too big'
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez says Congress should break up companies like Apple due to rising tech prices linked to AI chip supply chain strain.

item.title: Bill Clinton reveals how he feels about upcoming midterms after socialist victories
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton says Democrats are in good shape for November midterms despite three socialist candidates winning key New York primary races.

item.title: Trump scores another endorsement win with Louisiana Senate runoff victory
item.description: Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow defeats John Fleming in Louisiana's GOP Senate runoff, marking another win for the president's endorsement power.

item.title: World Cup Freddy Hunts for Moose, Finds Some Real Heights in Northeastern U.S.
